channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Yachts Jobs
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location: Key West, Florida
Description:

Skilled and dependable Maintenance Mechanics are sought for a yacht maintenance role in Key West, Florida. This position involves performing a wide range of maintenance, repair, and troubleshooting tasks across various marine systems and equipment. The ideal candidate will have proven experience in mechanical and electrical systems, with a strong background in marine electrical systems troubleshooting and propulsion systems maintenance. Familiarity with rigging, fabrication, and welding is also beneficial. This is an employee-owned company offering health, dental, vision, and life insurance.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Yacht Mechanic Job in Key West, Florida at Hartman Yacht Maintenance inc.

item.description:
Location: France
Description:

A relief Chief Officer is required for a 60-meter motor yacht operating in France. This 10-week position starts on August 8th and requires a Chief Mate or Master 3000 license. The role involves a busy charter/private program with an above-industry standard salary. The itinerary includes the end of the Mediterranean season, a crossing, and the start of the Caribbean season.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer Job on 60m Motor Yacht at YOA Yacht Crew

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Opportunities are available for hospitality professionals aboard luxury yachts. This role offers a unique chance to contribute to reimagining luxury at sea. Key requirements and specific joining details will be provided upon application.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Hospitality Jobs on Luxury Yachts at Four Seasons Yachts

item.description:
Location: Summer Isles, Scotland
Description:

A Commercial Skipper is sought for a unique restoration and regeneration charity operating passenger transport, crew & cargo movements, logistics support, and fuel-transfer operations in the Summer Isles, Scotland. This year-round role requires strong boat-handling skills, experience in exposed coastal waters, and essential tickets including RYA Advanced Powerboat/OOW and Commercial Endorsement. Commutable to Badentarbat Bay is necessary, with potential accommodation available. A 10 on / 4 off shift pattern may be considered.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Commercial Skipper Job - Summer Isles, Scotland at Clyde Marine Recruitment

item.description:
Location: Greece
Description:

A Chief Officer position is available on a yacht operating in Greece. This role requires experienced deck officers. Interested candidates are encouraged to apply promptly. Further details regarding contract duration and joining date will be provided during the application process.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer Job on Yacht in Greece at Variety Cruises

item.description:
Location: TBC
Description:

A Deckhand is sought for a 50m new build private motor yacht. This permanent role involves assisting with all exterior operations, including deck maintenance, mooring, and tender driving. Previous yachting experience, a B1/B2 visa, and a non-smoking, professional attitude are required. Salary is based on experience (DOE) in USD. Joining is ASAP.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Deckhand Job on 50m New Build Private Motor Yacht at Seven Seas Recruitment

item.description:
Location: global
Description:

A Skipper position is available for the Clipper Round the World Yacht Race. This role requires exceptional candidates with proven strong leadership and instructing backgrounds, capable of managing a team of approximately 60 race crew. The position offers a unique opportunity to lead a competitive entry in a global challenge, circumnavigating the world on a yacht.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Skipper Job on Clipper Race Yacht at Clipper Ventures PLC

item.description:
Location: Worldwide
Description:

A full crew is sought for multiple Mega Yachts (30-80m). Positions include Master, Chief Officer, Chief Engineer, 2nd Engineer, Stewardess, and Deckhand. Contracts are offered from 3 months on/off, with worldwide working areas. Salary is negotiable based on experience and interview. This is a full-time role requiring 2 years of experience.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Yacht Crew Vacancies - Master, Engineer, Stewardess, Deckhand at ORCA MS Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Deckhand position is available on an 80m private and charter motor yacht. The role requires a minimum of 1 year of experience in the yachting industry. The offered salary is $4,000 per month. This is an excellent opportunity for an experienced individual seeking their next role in the yachting sector.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Deckhand Job on 80m Motor Yacht at Yotspot

item.description:
Location: Greece
Description:

A Deckhand position is available on a 29m Motor Yacht (M/Y) for charter operations in Greece. This role is ideal for individuals seeking opportunities within the yachting industry. Further details and additional listings can be found via the provided link.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Deckhand Job on Motor Yacht (M/Y) at Seazone
